nodes.name: Black-throated antbird
nodes.summary: Black-throated antbird（Black-throated antbird，学名 Myrmophylax atrothorax），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联14个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括人类活动扰动。

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered fairly common in most of its range though locally common in Colombia and "scarce and local" in Ecuador. It occurs in protected areas in most of the countries it inhabits, and "[i]ts ability to occupy a variety of secondary and edge habitats renders it less vulnerable to disturbance than are most other thamnophilids"
